config.script:
class RapParamCustom Private m_strXMLPart Private m_strVBPart Private m_strFopenPart Private m_strParamName Private m_strBindExpr Private m_strBindExprRight Private m_nMode Private m_pAfc Private m_bAllowNone private m_pFilterPage'a tak sobie pomocniczo :-) private m_nParamNr Private Sub initialize() m_nMode = 0 m_strXMLPart = "" m_strVBPart = "" m_strBindExpr = "" m_strBindExprRight = "" m_strFopenPart = "" m_nNettoBrutto = clng(2) m_bAllowNone = False End Sub Public Function allow_none() m_bAllowNone = True End Function Public Property Let ParamName(ByVal vData ) m_strParamName = vData End Property Public Property Get ParamName() ParamName = m_strParamName End Property Public Property Let mode(ByVal nMode ) m_nMode = nMode End Property Public Property Get mode() mode = m_nMode End Property Public Property Get waluta() set waluta = m_pWaluta End Property Public Function Bind(ByVal strTableName , ByVal strFieldName ) m_strBindExpr = strTableName + "." + strFieldName Set Bind = Me End Function Public Function BindExpr(ByVal strBindExpr ) m_strBindExpr = strBindExpr Set BindExpr = Me End Function Public Function BindExprRight(ByVal strBindExprRight ) m_strBindExprRight = strBindExprRight Set BindExprRight = Me End Function Public Function get_bindexpr() get_bindexpr = m_strBindExpr End Function Public Function get_xml_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strXMLPart = vbCrLf + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " wszystkie niezerowe" + vbCrLf + _ " tylko powyżej stanu maksymalnego" + vbCrLf + _ " tylko poniżej stanu minimalnego" + vbCrLf + _ " tylko zerowe" + vbCrLf + _ " tylko ujemne" + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf get_xml_part = m_strXMLPart End Function Public Function get_vb_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 ' on dataentered dla radiobutona m_strVBPart = vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_RADIO) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_RADIO) + "_ondataentered=true" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_RADIO) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf 'ongetdata dla radiobutona m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_RADIO) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_RADIO) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_RADIO) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "function check" + CStr(nParamNr) + vbCrLf + _ " check" + CStr(nParamNr) + " = true" + vbCrLf + _ "end function " m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function init" + CStr(firstId) + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl("+cstr(firstId+OFFSET_RADIO)+").value=clng(STAMMAG_NIEZEROWE)" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " dim strDesc" + vbCrLf + _ " select case newValue" + vbCrLf + _ " case STAMMAG_NIEZEROWE" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc = ""Stany magazynowe: wszystkie niezerowe""" + vbCrLf + _ " case STAMMAG_POWYZEJ_MAX" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc = ""Stany magazynowe: wszystkie powyżej dopuszczalnego stanu maksymalnego""" + vbCrLf + _ " case STAMMAG_PONIZEJ_MIN" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc = ""Stany magazynowe: wszystkie poniżej dopuszczalnego stanu minimalnego""" + vbCrLf + _ " case STAMMAG_ZEROWE" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc = ""Stany magazynowe: wszystkie zerowe""" + vbCrLf + _ " case STAMMAG_UJEMNE" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc = ""Stany magazynowe: wszystkie ujemne""" + vbCrLf + _ " end select" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_DESC) + ").text = strDesc" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_DESC) + ").forecolor=rgb(0,0,0)" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf get_vb_part = m_strVBPart End Function Public Function get_desc():get_desc = "" 'if mode <> STAMMAG_NIEZEROWE then get_desc = get_desc_from_page(m_nParamNr , m_pFilterPage ) 'end if End Function ' instrukcje inicjujące stany kontrolek - do fopen Public Function get_vb_init_ctrls_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strFopenPart = "init" + CStr(firstId) + "()" + vbCrLf get_vb_init_ctrls_part = m_strFopenPart End Function Public Function get_where_part(ByRef pTransaction) select case m_nMode case STAMMAG_NIEZEROWE: get_where_part = "("+ m_strBindExpr + " <> 0)" case STAMMAG_POWYZEJ_MAX: get_where_part = "("+ m_strBindExpr + " > max(" + m_strBindExprRight + ".c_curIloscMax) )" case STAMMAG_PONIZEJ_MIN: get_where_part = "("+ m_strBindExpr + " < max(" + m_strBindExprRight + ".c_curIloscMin) )" case STAMMAG_ZEROWE: get_where_part = "("+ m_strBindExpr + " = 0)" case STAMMAG_UJEMNE: get_where_part = "("+ m_strBindExpr + " < 0)" end select End Function 'czy wyswietlac czy nie Public Function is_complete() is_complete = (m_nMode <> 0) End Function 'czy prawidlowe wartości Public Function is_valid(ByRef strMessage ) is_valid = true End Function 'transfer z kontrolek na obiekt filtru Public Function Update(ByVal nParamNr , ByVal page ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 mode = page.ctrl(firstId + OFFSET_RADIO).value set m_pFilterPage = page m_nParamNr = nParamNr End Function Public Function get_desc_from_page(ByVal nParamNr , ByVal page ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 if not isEmpty(page) then get_desc_from_page = CStr(page.ctrl(firstId + OFFSET_DESC).text) else get_desc_from_page = "" end if End Function Public Function paramtype() paramtype = -1 End Function end class function new_custom(byval strParamName) Set new_custom = New RapParamCustom new_custom.ParamName = strParamName end function function new_filtr_grupa_prod(byval strBindExpr) dim pParamGrPrId set pParamGrPrId = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_choice("Grupa produktów").bindexpr(strBindExpr) doc_.afc.rap.param.init_on_query pParamGrPrId,trans_,"select strNazwa,IdObj from n5grupaproduktow order by strNazwa " set new_filtr_grupa_prod = pParamGrPrId end function function new_filtr_magazyn(byval strBindExpr,byval streTypMag) set new_filtr_magazyn = new_filtr_magazyn_ext(strBindExpr,streTypMag,"") end function function new_filtr_magazyn_ext(byval strBindExpr,byval streTypMag,byval strNazwa) dim pParamMAGID if strNazwa <> "" then set pParamMAGID = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_choice(strNazwa).bindexpr(strBindExpr) else set pParamMAGID = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_choice("Magazyn").bindexpr(strBindExpr) end if dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors("select strNazwa,idobj,mag_eAktywny from n5magazyn " +_ " where eTyp in (" + streTypMag + ") order by strNazwa ") do while not oRS.EOF pParamMAGID.names.add oRS.fields(0).Value pParamMAGID.values.add oRS.fields(1).Value pParamMAGID.selected.add (oRS.fields(2).Value = 1) oRS.movenext loop set new_filtr_magazyn_ext = pParamMAGID end function function rap_param_date_range_2_gm_num_oper_where(byref pRapParamOkres,byref numopStart,byref numopEnd) dim strResultWhere : strResultWhere = " = 0 " dim strWhere : strWhere = pRapParamOkres.BindExpr("ddatawyst").get_where_part(trans_) dim pModUtil : set pModUtil = doc_.getmodule(60253) if pModUtil.convert_date_range_to_num_oper_range(strWhere,numopStart,numopEnd) then strResultWhere = " between " + cstr(numopStart) + " and " + cstr(numopEnd) + " " end if rap_param_date_range_2_gm_num_oper_where = strResultWhere end function function rap_param_date_2_gm_num_oper_where(byref pRapParamDate,byref numopEnd) dim strResultWhere : strResultWhere = " = 0 " dim strWhere : strWhere = "dDataWyst <= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pRapParamDate.first_value) dim pModUtil : set pModUtil = doc_.getmodule(60253) dim nDummy if pModUtil.convert_date_range_to_num_oper_range(strWhere,nDummy,numopEnd) then strResultWhere = " <= " + cstr(numopEnd) + " " end if rap_param_date_2_gm_num_oper_where = strResultWhere end function
